plugins.name: socratic
plugins.description: The Socratic-Feynman method as a Claude Code plugin. Three commands: /socratic:ask grills the user one question at a time; /socratic:think self-grills with one user review checkpoint; /socratic:feynman runs a teaching-mode synthesis pass over a prior session or a clearly marked cold draft, surfaces gaps interactively, and writes a human-readable conclusion.html.
